name: Volt Typhoon (BRONZE SILHOUETTE)
description:
2026-05-18 | Active Pre-Positioning & LotL Activity
Target: Critical infrastructure Operational Technology (OT) networks in Singapore, focused heavily on port automation control systems supporting PSA and Jurong Port layouts.
Vector: Stealth-first Living-off-the-land (LotL) execution exploiting unpatched edge networking components to harvest internal domain credentials.
Impact: Silent establishment of persistent access footprints inside Terminal Operating Systems (TOS).

name: Lazarus Group (APT38)
description:
2026-05-29 | Maritime Competitor Financial Fraud
Target: Commercial shipping lines and local bunkering fleets operating out of the Singapore Maritime Hub.
Vector: Business Email Compromise (BEC) paired with malicious PDF attachments disguised as seafarer certification renewals and fuel invoices.
Impact: Direct financial siphoning via fraudulent redirection of fuel bunkering payments, directly impacting peer-group cash flows.

name: The Gentlemen Syndicate
description:
2026-05-15 | Data Wiper Extortion Surge
Target: Mid-tier container shipping operators and maritime logistics competitors in Southeast Asia.
Vector: Exploitation of virtualized environments (VMware ESXi) paired with VECT 2.0 software payloads.
Impact: Destruction of file assets larger than 128KB, completely crippling internal scheduling logs and tracking systems of direct industry peers.

name: Akira Ransomware Group
description:
2026-05-12 | Vendor Supply Chain Extortion
Target: Third-party cloud-native Maritime Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) and fleet logistics software providers serving Singapore hub networks.
Vector: Helpdesk social engineering and high-frequency MFA fatigue attacks to compromise administrator portals.
Impact: Quiet data-theft campaign exfiltrating over 1TB of cargo manifests and custom clearance pipelines without deploying active encryption payloads.

name: APT40 (Island Dreams)
description:
2026-05-28 | Navigational Supply Infiltration
Target: Marine Satellite Communication (Satcom) infrastructure networks and Electronic Chart Display & Information Systems (ECDIS) vendors in the region.
Vector: Precision spear-phishing targeting shore-side marine technicians to place malicious updates inside firmware deployment channels.
Impact: Ongoing downstream delivery attempts to land backdoors inside vessel bridge networks.

name: Handala Cyber-Espionage Group
description:
2026-05-08 | Geopolitical Transit Hub Infiltration
Target: Public data mirrors and third-party transit agency databases linked to global shipping lanes.
Vector: Structured credential harvesting paired with targeted application layer exploits.
Impact: Mass exfiltration of regional ship logs, customs profiles, and global transit schedules.
